cn_title: 《生化危机：代号维罗妮卡》重制版正式公布，2027年发售
subtitle: 经典重制，2027见
opus_summary: 卡普空在夏日游戏节公布《生化危机：代号维罗妮卡》重制版，定名《生化危机：维罗妮卡》，2027年发售。预告片展示克莱尔在巴黎公寓的新开场，故事重新演绎经典。

paragraphs.en: Capcom has revealed a Resident Evil: Code Veronica remake, just named Resident Evil Veronica, delighting fans of the franchise watching this year's Summer Game Fest livestream.
paragraphs.cn: 卡普空在今年的夏日游戏节直播中公布了《生化危机：代号维罗妮卡》的重制版，定名为《生化危机：维罗妮卡》，令系列粉丝欣喜不已。

paragraphs.en: Footage showed an unnamed female character being shown around a Parisian apartment (though the clue here is she's the sister of someone else here on a secret mission). The footage concludes with the reveal that this is none other than Claire Redfield (sister of Chris) — and this is a reimagined take on the classic Code Veronica story.
paragraphs.cn: 预告片中，一名未具名的女性角色被带领参观一间巴黎公寓（不过线索暗示她是某位执行秘密任务之人的妹妹）。片尾揭示，此人正是克莱尔·雷德菲尔德（克里斯的妹妹）——而本作是对经典《代号维罗妮卡》故事的重新演绎。

paragraphs.en: While great news for Resident Evil fans, the announcement does not come as too much of a surprise. Previous reporting had pinned a Code Veronica remake for a 2027 release , and tipped its reveal as taking place this year following the launch of Resident Evil: Requiem .
paragraphs.cn: 虽然这对《生化危机》粉丝来说是个好消息，但这一公布并不令人意外。此前的报道已指出《代号维罗妮卡》重制版计划于2027年发售，并预计在《生化危机：安魂曲》发售后于今年公布。

paragraphs.en: IGN previously verified that a new version of the game is indeed in development , alongside a further-off Resident Evil Zero remake as well. MP1st , meanwhile, has claimed that the game had been pencilled in with a Q1 2027 launch window. And of course, this remake follows Capcom's previous new versions of Resident Evil 2, 3 and 4.
paragraphs.cn: IGN此前已证实该游戏的新版本确实在开发中，同时还有一款更遥远的《生化危机0》重制版。此外，MP1st声称该作暂定于2027年第一季度发售。当然，这款重制版是继卡普空此前推出的《生化危机2》《生化危机3》和《生化危机4》重制版之后的又一力作。

paragraphs.en: Resident Evil: Code Veronica originally launched in 2000 for the Sega Dreamcast. It's not a mainline numbered entry in the series, but it remains beloved by fans and considered a core part of the franchise's story. Its narrative takes place around the same time as Resident Evil 3, but instead features Claire and Chris Redfield on a remote prison island and then in Antarctica. And yes, fan-favorite baddie Wesker is also involved.
paragraphs.cn: 《生化危机：代号维罗妮卡》最初于2000年登陆世嘉Dreamcast。它并非系列主线编号作品，但深受粉丝喜爱，被视为系列故事的核心组成部分。其剧情与《生化危机3》大致同时发生，但主角是克莱尔和克里斯·雷德菲尔德，场景从一座偏远监狱岛延伸至南极。没错，粉丝最爱的反派威斯克也会登场。

paragraphs.en: To catch up on all the announcements from tonight, be sure to check out IGN's roundup of everything announced during Summer Game Fest 2026 .
paragraphs.cn: 要了解今晚的所有公告，请务必查看IGN对2026年夏日游戏节全部内容的汇总。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
